title: catabrosella variegata subsp. leiantha
intro: Catabrosella variegata subsp. leiantha, also known as Leianthus, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which are beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Catabrosella variegata subsp. leiantha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
